name: BT Brands, Inc.
summary: BT Brands, Inc. owns and operates nine restaurants across the Midwest, Massachusetts, and Florida, including six Burger Time fast-food restaurants, Keegans Seafood Grille, Pie In The Sky Coffee, and Schnitzel Haus. The company also holds a 40.7% minority interest in Bagger Dave's Burger Tavern, operating five casual-dining locations. In 2025, BT Brands entered a proposed merger with Aero Velocity Inc., an unmanned aerial vehicle manufacturer, and plans to spin off its restaurant operations into BT Group, Inc.

products.name: Burger Time
products.description: Fast-food restaurants offering flame-broiled burgers, chicken sandwiches, and sides via drive-thru and take-out in Minnesota, North Dakota, and South Dakota.

products.name: Keegans Seafood Grille
products.description: Casual seafood restaurant located in Indian Rocks Beach, Florida.

products.name: Pie In The Sky Coffee
products.description: Coffee shop and bakery located in Woods Hole, Massachusetts.

products.name: Schnitzel Haus
products.description: German-themed fine dining restaurant and bar located in Hobe Sound, Florida.

products.name: Bagger Dave's Burger Tavern
products.description: Casual-dining burger restaurants in Michigan, Ohio, and Indiana; BT Brands holds a 40.7% minority interest.

partnerships.description: Proposed merger agreement signed September 2, 2025; BT Brands to combine with Aero and spin off restaurant operations into BT Group, Inc.
Financial advisor to BT Brands in connection with the proposed business combination with Aero Velocity Inc.
